title: homeorlivetabloadscontent
description: Open http://localhost:3000 (home or /ao-vivo). Verify page loads without error and shows area for live streams or placeholder content (not blank white screen).

title: searchshowsptemptywhennorresults
description: Navigate to search page or open search UI, submit query with unlikely string. Expect visible PT-AO empty message such as Nenhum resultado or equivalent.

title: categoryfilteravailable
description: If category filter exists on browse/explore, select Gaming (or Música) and verify UI updates without crash.

title: streamorchannelrouteloads
description: Navigate to a public stream path e.g. /stream/test or channel path if linked from home; expect 200 page or graceful offline state, not 500.

title: onboardingprovincestep
description: If accessible without full auth, open registar/onboarding flow Step 4 and verify province dropdown lists Angolan provinces (21 options).

title: chatemptyinputblocked
description: On a stream watch page with chat input, try submit empty message; expect no send or validation (blocked).

title: chatlongmessageblocked
description: On stream chat, paste 500+ character string; expect block, trim, or error - not silent accept as single message.

title: chatptaocharacters
description: Send short message with ã ç ê emojis if logged in; message accepted or appropriate auth prompt, no server error visible.
